name: sdp_cloud_run_service_failures
description: Counts Cloud Run container exit(non-zero) and startup-probe-failed log lines across all SDP services. Used by the generic 'SDP Cloud Run service failing' Grafana alert.
filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND ((textPayload:"Container called exit" AND NOT textPayload:"Container called exit(0)") OR (textPayload:"STARTUP" AND textPayload:"probe failed" AND textPayload:"The instance was not started") OR textPayload:"Container terminated on signal")
